# SquarePen

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="SquarePen icon">

RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Tags
pencil, edit, change, create, draw, sketch, draft, writer, writing, biro, ink, marker, felt tip, stationery, artist

## Categories
text

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/square-pen)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SquarePen;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SquarePen { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
